curated_yellow_tripdata.description: NYC TLC Yellow Taxi trip records, curated and partitioned for analytics in Athena.
curated_yellow_tripdata.partitions_hint: Always filter by year and month partitions to reduce Athena scan cost. For this dataset, timeframe is Jan-Jun 2022.

tpep_pickup_datetime.description: The date and time when the meter was engaged (pickup).

tpep_dropoff_datetime.description: The date and time when the meter was disengaged (dropoff).

passenger_count.description: Number of passengers reported by the driver.

trip_distance.description: Trip distance in miles reported by the taximeter.

ratecodeid.description: Final rate code in effect at the end of the trip.

store_and_fwd_flag.description: Indicates whether the trip record was held in vehicle memory before sending to vendor due to lack of connection.

enum.N: Not a store and forward trip

pulocationid.description: TLC Taxi Zone ID where the meter was engaged (pickup location).

dolocationid.description: TLC Taxi Zone ID where the meter was disengaged (dropoff location).

payment_type.description: Payment type used for the trip.

fare_amount.description: Time-and-distance fare calculated by the meter.

mta_tax.description: MTA tax automatically triggered based on metered rate.

tip_amount.description: Tip amount (only for credit card tips; cash tips are not included).

tolls_amount.description: Total amount of all tolls paid during the trip.

improvement_surcharge.description: Improvement surcharge assessed on hailed trips.

total_amount.description: Total amount charged to passengers (does not include cash tips).

congestion_surcharge.description: Congestion surcharge for trips in congestion zone when applicable.

vendorid.description: Code indicating the provider that supplied the record.

year.description: Partition year derived from trip data (string in Glue).

month.description: Partition month derived from trip data (string in Glue).

data_quality_rules.notes: If your curated table already applied these rules in Spark/Glue, keep them as optional constraints for the AI.
